AHL Season IDs

Source: R/ahl.R
ahl_season_id.Rd

All seasons for the AHL with end-year and game-type labels, from the HockeyTech modulekit/seasons feed.

Usage

ahl_season_id()

Value

A fastRhockey_data data frame with columns: season_id, season_name, season_short, career, playoff, start_date, end_date, season_yr, game_type_label.

See also

Other AHL Functions: ahl, ahl_game_corsi(), ahl_game_shifts(), ahl_game_summary(), ahl_leaders(), ahl_pbp(), ahl_player_stats(), ahl_player_toi(), ahl_schedule(), ahl_standings(), ahl_team_roster(), ahl_teams(), most_recent_ahl_season()

Examples

 try(ahl_season_id()) 
#> ── AHL Season IDs from HockeyTech ───────────────────────── fastRhockey 1.0.0 ──
#> ℹ Data updated: 2026-06-12 14:17:15 UTC
#> # A tibble: 75 × 9
#>    season_id season_name         season_short career playoff start_date end_date
#>        <dbl> <chr>               <chr>        <chr>  <chr>   <chr>      <chr>   
#>  1        92 2026 Calder Cup Pl… 26 Playoffs  1      1       2026-04-20 2026-06…
#>  2        91 2026 All-Star Chal… 26 All-Star  0      0       2026-02-10 2026-02…
#>  3        90 2025-26 Regular Se… 2025-26      1      0       2025-10-07 2026-04…
#>  4        88 2025 Calder Cup Pl… 25 Playoffs  1      1       2025-04-21 2025-06…
#>  5        87 2025 All-Star Chal… 25 All-Star  0      0       2025-02-03 2025-02…
#>  6        86 2024-25 Regular Se… 2024-25      1      0       2024-10-09 2025-04…
#>  7        84 2024 Calder Cup Pl… 24 Playoffs  1      1       2024-04-22 2024-06…
#>  8        83 2024 All-Star Chal… 24 All-Star  0      0       2024-02-05 2024-02…
#>  9        81 2023-24 Regular Se… 2023-24      1      0       2023-10-12 2024-04…
#> 10        80 2023 Calder Cup Pl… 23 Playoffs  1      1       2023-04-17 2023-06…
#> # ℹ 65 more rows
#> # ℹ 2 more variables: season_yr <int>, game_type_label <chr>
